review_required: Every ignored RustSec advisory must have a waiver entry. Release evidence fails if an ignored advisory is missing or expired.

advisories.rationale: Unmaintained transitive GTK3 binding. Windows public-beta artifact does not ship the Linux WebKit/GTK stack; keep tracked until upstream Tauri/Linux stack moves.
advisories.release_note: Rust advisory waiver: transitive Linux GTK3 stack warning tracked; Windows public-beta artifact unaffected.

advisories.rationale: Unmaintained transitive macro tooling dependency. No direct production use is introduced by CivicNewspaper; keep tracked until upstream dependencies remove it.
advisories.release_note: Rust advisory waiver: transitive proc-macro-error warning tracked until upstream removal.

advisories.rationale: Unmaintained transitive unic crate via Tauri URL-pattern dependencies. No direct CivicNewspaper API consumes it; keep tracked until upstream replacement.
advisories.release_note: Rust advisory waiver: transitive unic/urlpattern warnings tracked until upstream replacement.

advisories.source: transitive PDF extraction stack through pdf-extract/lopdf
advisories.rationale: Unmaintained transitive PDF parsing dependency. Source import remains editor-reviewed and local; keep tracked until pdf-extract/lopdf stack offers a maintained replacement.
advisories.release_note: Rust advisory waiver: transitive PDF parsing stack warning tracked until upstream replacement.

advisories.rationale: Target-specific transitive Linux GTK stack warning. Windows public-beta artifact does not ship the Linux WebKit/GTK stack; keep tracked until upstream Tauri/Linux stack moves.
advisories.release_note: Rust advisory waiver: transitive Linux glib warning tracked; Windows public-beta artifact unaffected.

advisories.rationale: The reachable CivicNewspaper source-ingestion feed parser was moved off feed-rs and now uses direct quick-xml >=0.41 with a source response byte cap. The remaining vulnerable quick-xml 0.39.4 path is through Tauri/plist metadata tooling, not untrusted civic source parsing in the Windows public-beta artifact.
advisories.release_note: Rust advisory waiver: transitive Tauri/plist quick-xml warning tracked; source ingestion uses patched quick-xml.

advisories.rationale: The reachable CivicNewspaper source-ingestion feed parser uses direct quick-xml >=0.41 and the plain Reader API, with response byte caps for both source pages and robots.txt. The remaining quick-xml 0.39.4 copy is transitive Tauri/plist metadata tooling, not untrusted civic source ingestion in the Windows public-beta artifact.
advisories.release_note: Rust advisory waiver: transitive Tauri/plist quick-xml warning tracked; source ingestion uses patched quick-xml and capped inputs.
